name: eve-sde-mcp
description: MCP server exposing EVE Online Static Data Export (SDE) game data to AI agents.
long_description: A stdio MCP server that exposes the EVE Online Static Data Export (SDE) — types, blueprints, dogma attributes/effects, market groups, the solar-system graph, skill plans, and more — to AI agents. The SDE (~81 MB) is downloaded and indexed on first run; lookups are served from byte-offset indexes with no database.

data_dir.title: SDE Data Directory
data_dir.description: Where the downloaded SDE cache is stored. Leave unset to use the per-OS default (e.g. ~/.local/share/eve-sde-mcp on Linux, %APPDATA%\eve-sde-mcp on Windows).

language.title: Language Filter
language.description: Filter localized name fields to a single language (e.g. en, de, fr, ja, ru, zh, ko, es). Falls back to English when a translation is missing.
